body:
# Description

Cancelled by the 2026-04 pre-ACP archive pass. The Discord overlay line was superseded and archived.


# [PKT-DSC-002](task-0148): Release Summary Publishing

## Purpose

Implement Discord release summary publishing.

## Scope

- Summary format
- Publishing logic
- Scheduling

## Implementation

1. Define format
2. Implement publishing
3. Add scheduling

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Format defined
2. Publishing works
3. Scheduled
